chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1296 of 2019 C. P. No. D – 392 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge C. P. No. D – 1296 of 2019 For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.4511/2023 (C/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.3884/2023 (151 CPC) C. P. No. D – 392 of 2020 For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.4487/2023 (C/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.3890/2023 (151 CPC) 14.11.2023 Petitioners Akhtar Ali Mahoto and Sikandar Ali are present in person. Mr. Nisaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG Sindh has filed a statement and states that in two to three weeks, the grievances of the petitioners would be redressed. Accordingly, listed applications are disposed of. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
